creator: tmseck@web.de
text:
- Update www/squid to 2.7.STABLE6 - Update www/squid30 to 3.0.STABLE13 These updates address Squid-Advisory 2009:1. Proposed VuXML-Entry: Squid -- remote denial of service vulnerability squid 2.7.12.7.6 3.0.13.0.13

Squid security advisory 2009:1 reports:

Due to an internal error Squid is vulnerable to a denial of service attack when processing specially crafted requests.

This problem allows any client to perform a denial of service attack on the Squid service.

 http://secunia.com/advisories/33731/ 2009-02-02 Fix: Apply these patches: www/squid: www/squid30:
